name: aiot-smart-greenhouse
displayDescription: Full-stack AIoT greenhouse monitoring and control system. Needed for automated agricultural environment management using IoT sensors. Features real-time sensor dashboards (temperature, humidity, soil moisture, water level, light, rain), automated device control (fans, pumps, lights, windows), MQTT-based ESP32 communication, configurable alert thresholds, and email notifications. Contains 4 parts: ESP32 embedded firmware (C++), Node.js/Express backend with MongoDB + Redis, Next.js frontend with WebSocket live updates, and Docker Compose deployment. Built for an HCMUS IoT course. Used by agriculture enthusiasts and IoT students.
